title: salix × boulayi
intro: Salix × boulayi, also known as Boulay's willow or Boulay's hybrid willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix viminalis and Salix purpurea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Salix × boulayi have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Salix × boulayi, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
